requirement_topic.en: IANOR / IEC 62619 Lithium Battery Safety for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: IANOR / IEC 62619 储能锂电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: IANOR / IEC 62619 儲能鋰電池安全

summary.en: Algeria's national standards body is the Institut Algérien de Normalisation (IANOR), which publishes NA (norme algérienne) standards and adopts IEC standards into the Algerian national standards framework. IEC 62619:2022 (safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications) is the applicable standard for BESS battery cells and modules. IANOR adoption of IEC 62619 means project owners, international lenders, and insurers operating in Algeria expect test evidence against IEC 62619 or an equivalent recognised third-party test. IEC 62133 applies where it overlaps in scope for smaller battery modules. Algeria's product conformity framework may require a conformity certificate from an IANOR-recognised or internationally accredited inspection body before import of regulated electrical equipment. Exporters should confirm with IANOR and the relevant Algerian customs authority (Direction Générale des Douanes) whether a specific pre-shipment conformity certification scheme applies to the BESS product category.
summary.zh: 阿尔及利亚国家标准机构为阿尔及利亚标准化研究院（IANOR），负责发布NA（阿尔及利亚标准）标准并将IEC标准纳入阿尔及利亚国家标准体系。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯与电池安全要求）是BESS电池芯和模组的适用标准。IANOR采标IEC 62619意味着在阿尔及利亚运营的项目业主、国际贷款方和保险方期望提供IEC 62619或同等认可第三方测试的证据。IEC 62133适用于小型电池模组范围内有交叉适用的情形。阿尔及利亚的产品合格框架可能要求在进口受监管电气设备前，提供IANOR认可或国际认可检验机构颁发的合格证书。出口商应与IANOR及相关阿尔及利亚海关机构（关税总局）确认是否有适用于BESS产品类别的特定出货前合格认证计划。
summary.zht: 阿爾及利亞國家標準機構為阿爾及利亞標準化研究院（IANOR），負責發布NA（阿爾及利亞標準）標準並將IEC標準納入阿爾及利亞國家標準體系。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求）是BESS電池芯和模組的適用標準。IANOR採標IEC 62619意味著在阿爾及利亞運營的項目業主、國際貸款方和保險方期望提供IEC 62619或同等認可第三方測試的證據。IEC 62133適用於小型電池模組範圍內有交叉適用的情形。阿爾及利亞的產品合格框架可能要求在進口受監管電氣設備前，提供IANOR認可或國際認可檢驗機構頒發的合格證書。出口商應與IANOR及相關阿爾及利亞海關機構（關稅總局）確認是否有適用於BESS產品類別的特定出貨前合格認證計畫。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 as adopted within IANOR's NA framework (Institut Algérien de Normalisation)
IEC 62133 (portable sealed secondary cells — applicable where scope overlaps for smaller battery modules)
IEC 62933-5-2 (safety requirements for grid-integrated lithium-ion energy storage systems)
Algerian product conformity requirements for regulated electrical equipment (IANOR / Direction Générale des Douanes)

summary.en: China BESS battery safety is governed by GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage — safety requirements) and GB 44240-2024 (general safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems). These standards align with IEC 62619 in many technical respects but are not directly accepted by IANOR, CREG, Sonelgaz, or Algerian project owners as IEC 62619 compliance evidence; test evidence from an internationally accredited laboratory against IEC 62619 is needed.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电池安全以GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池安全要求）和GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统通用安全要求）为依据。这些标准在许多技术方面与IEC 62619对应，但不被IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz或阿尔及利亚项目业主直接接受为IEC 62619合规证据；需要国际认可实验室出具的IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電池安全以GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池安全要求）和GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統通用安全要求）為依據。這些標準在許多技術方面與IEC 62619對應，但不被IANOR、CREG、Sonelgaz或阿爾及利亞項目業主直接接受為IEC 62619合規證據；需要國際認可實驗室出具的IEC 62619測試證據。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 62619:2022 test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory for the battery cells and modules supplied in the BESS. Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 or GB 44240-2024 test data may support a gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route certification. Confirm with a qualified Algerian trade or customs consultant whether the specific BESS battery module and BMS product categories are subject to a pre-shipment conformity certification requirement under Algerian import regulations; if so, engage an accredited inspection body to conduct verification and obtain a conformity certificate before export. Prepare a battery safety data sheet and cell-level traceability dossier for project-owner, CREG, and insurer review.
gap.zh: 应委托国际认可实验室为BESS所供电池芯和模组出具IEC 62619:2022测试报告。中国GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024测试数据可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路径认证。应与合格的阿尔及利亚贸易或海关顾问确认特定BESS电池模组和BMS产品类别是否受阿尔及利亚进口法规下出货前合格认证要求约束；如是，应在出口前委托认可检验机构进行验证并取得合格证书。应准备电池安全数据表和电芯级可追溯文件包，供项目业主、CREG和保险方审查。
gap.zht: 應委託國際認可實驗室為BESS所供電池芯和模組出具IEC 62619:2022測試報告。中國GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024測試數據可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路徑認證。應與合格的阿爾及利亞貿易或海關顧問確認特定BESS電池模組和BMS產品類別是否受阿爾及利亞進口法規下出貨前合格認證要求約束；如是，應在出口前委託認可檢驗機構進行驗證並取得合格證書。應準備電池安全數據表和電芯級可追溯文件包，供項目業主、CREG和保險方審查。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62619 compliance is the expected technical route for IANOR-aligned safety; project-finance, CREG, and insurer requirements for Algeria's Solar programmes may make it de facto mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for Chinese BESS products; not directly transferable as IANOR or IEC conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 44240-2024 battery safety evidence does not directly satisfy the IANOR / IEC 62619 route expected for Algeria. Commission IEC 62619 testing from an internationally accredited laboratory before shipment. Confirm with an Algerian trade consultant whether a pre-shipment conformity certificate is required for the BESS product category under current import regulations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024电池安全证据不能直接满足阿尔及利亚预期的IANOR/IEC 62619路径。出货前应委托国际认可实验室完成IEC 62619测试。应与阿尔及利亚贸易顾问确认当前进口法规下BESS产品类别是否须取得出货前合格证书。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024電池安全證據不能直接滿足阿爾及利亞預期的IANOR/IEC 62619路徑。出貨前應委託國際認可實驗室完成IEC 62619測試。應與阿爾及利亞貿易顧問確認當前進口法規下BESS產品類別是否須取得出貨前合格證書。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62933 Energy Storage System Performance and Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62933 储能系统性能与安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62933 儲能系統性能與安全要求

summary.en: IEC 62933 (electrical energy storage — EES systems) covers planning, installation, safety, and performance requirements for stationary energy storage systems. IEC 62933-2-1 covers unit parameters and testing methods; IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 cover safety requirements for grid-integrated systems. Algerian project owners, international lenders (including IFC, AfDB, and bilateral development finance institutions active in Algeria), and CREG/Sonelgaz may expect system-level alignment with IEC 62933 for utility-scale or grid-connected BESS under Algeria's Solar 1000 and Solar 3000–4000 MW programmes, particularly where international project financing applies.
summary.zh: IEC 62933（电力储能——EES系统）涵盖固定式储能系统的规划、安装、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵盖单元参数和测试方法；IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2涵盖电网集成系统的安全要求。阿尔及利亚项目业主、国际贷款方（包括在阿尔及利亚活跃的IFC、非洲开发银行及双边开发金融机构）以及CREG/Sonelgaz对阿尔及利亚Solar 1000和Solar 3000–4000 MW项目下的公用事业规模或并网BESS可能期望系统级IEC 62933对应合规，尤其是涉及国际项目融资时。
summary.zht: IEC 62933（電力儲能——EES系統）涵蓋固定式儲能系統的規劃、安裝、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵蓋單元參數和測試方法；IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2涵蓋電網集成系統的安全要求。阿爾及利亞項目業主、國際貸款方（包括在阿爾及利亞活躍的IFC、非洲開發銀行及雙邊開發金融機構）以及CREG/Sonelgaz對阿爾及利亞Solar 1000和Solar 3000–4000 MW項目下的公用事業規模或併網BESS可能期望系統級IEC 62933對應合規，尤其是涉及國際項目融資時。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1 (EES systems — unit parameters and testing methods)
IEC 62933-5-1 (EES systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated systems, general specification)
IEC 62933-5-2 (EES systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated systems, lithium-ion)

summary.en: China system-level BESS safety and performance references include GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage stations connected to power systems), GB/T 34120-2023 (electrochemical energy storage system testing), and NB/T 42090-2016 (grid-connected battery energy storage inverter technical specifications). These standards address similar system integration requirements but are not accepted as IEC 62933 compliance evidence by Algerian project owners, international lenders, or CREG/Sonelgaz.
summary.zh: 中国系统级BESS安全和性能参考标准包括GB/T 36558-2023（接入电力系统的电化学储能电站通用技术要求）、GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统测试）和NB/T 42090-2016（并网电池储能变流器技术规范）。这些标准涵盖类似的系统集成要求，但不被阿尔及利亚项目业主、国际贷款方或CREG/Sonelgaz接受为IEC 62933合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國系統級BESS安全和性能參考標準包括GB/T 36558-2023（接入電力系統的電化學儲能電站通用技術要求）、GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統測試）和NB/T 42090-2016（併網電池儲能變流器技術規範）。這些標準涵蓋類似的系統集成要求，但不被阿爾及利亞項目業主、國際貸款方或CREG/Sonelgaz接受為IEC 62933合規證據。

gap.en: Prepare system-level IEC 62933-2-1 performance data and IEC 62933-5-1 / 5-2 safety documentation for the BESS being offered to Algerian projects. Engage with the project owner, independent engineer, or lender to confirm which specific IEC 62933 parts apply and whether third-party testing is required. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 and GB/T 34120-2023 data may be used in technical discussions but should be supplemented with IEC-route evidence.
gap.zh: 应为向阿尔及利亚项目提供的BESS准备系统级IEC 62933-2-1性能数据及IEC 62933-5-1/5-2安全文件。应与项目业主、独立工程师或贷款方沟通，确认适用的具体IEC 62933部分及是否要求第三方测试。中国GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023数据可用于技术讨论，但应以IEC路径证据补充。
gap.zht: 應為向阿爾及利亞項目提供的BESS準備系統級IEC 62933-2-1性能數據及IEC 62933-5-1/5-2安全文件。應與項目業主、獨立工程師或貸款方溝通，確認適用的具體IEC 62933部分及是否要求第三方測試。中國GB/T 36558-2023和GB/T 34120-2023數據可用於技術討論，但應以IEC路徑證據補充。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary at standard level but de facto mandatory for utility-scale projects under Algeria's Solar programmes with international project finance, IFC, AfDB, or CREG/Sonelgaz review
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary reference standard; mandatory elements covered by GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36558-2023 for Chinese projects

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 system documentation is useful context but is not a substitute for IEC 62933 compliance evidence expected by Algerian project owners, international lenders, or CREG/Sonelgaz for utility-scale BESS under Algeria's Solar programmes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023系统文件具有参考价值，但不能替代阿尔及利亚项目业主、国际贷款方或CREG/Sonelgaz对阿尔及利亚太阳能项目中公用事业规模BESS所期望的IEC 62933合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023系統文件具有參考價值，但不能替代阿爾及利亞項目業主、國際貸款方或CREG/Sonelgaz對阿爾及利亞太陽能項目中公用事業規模BESS所期望的IEC 62933合規證據。
